category_sources: source_facts.description says it measures complexity of C source; GNU Complexity manual is titled Measure complexity of C source.
display_name_sources: GNU Complexity manual and project page use GNU Complexity; source_facts.name is gnu-complexity.
docs_sources: Official GNU Complexity manual page provides the online manual in multiple formats.
repo_sources: Savannah Git Repositories page for group complexity gives anonymous clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/complexity.git; cgit is the official browser for that repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C source complexity measurement; GNU Complexity manual describes computing complexity scores for source code and command-line invocation.
